connectorUiConfig.title: Wiz (Codeless)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The [Wiz](https://wiz.io/) connector allows you to easily send Wiz Issues, Vulnerability Findings, and Audit logs to Microsoft Sentinel using the Wiz GraphQL API.

**Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:**

This solution uses the Codeless Connector Platform (CCF) which leverages:
- [Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules (DCR)](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/data-collection-rule-overview)
- [Azure Monitor Data Collection Endpoints (DCE)](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/data-collection-endpoint-overview)

sampleQueries.query:
WizIssues_CL
| summarize count() by Severity
| order by count_ desc

dataTypes.name: WizIssues_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
WizIssues_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: WizVulnerabilities_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
WizVulnerabilities_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: WizAuditLogs_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
WizAuditLogs_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

Read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required. [See the documentation to learn more about workspace keys](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-windows#obtain-workspace-id-and-key).

customs.name: Wiz Service Account Credentials
customs.description: You need Wiz Service Account credentials with appropriate permissions. Follow instructions on [Wiz documentation](https://docs.wiz.io/wiz-docs/docs/azure-sentinel-native-integration#collect-authentication-info-from-wiz) to obtain Client ID, Client Secret, API Endpoint URL, and Auth URL.

instructionSteps.title: Step 1: Obtain Wiz API Credentials
instructionSteps.description:
Follow the instructions on [Wiz documentation](https://docs.wiz.io/wiz-docs/docs/azure-sentinel-native-integration#collect-authentication-info-from-wiz) to create a Wiz Service Account and obtain the following:

- **Client ID**
- **Client Secret**
- **API Endpoint URL** (e.g., https://api.us1.app.wiz.io/graphql)
- **Auth URL** (e.g., https://auth.app.wiz.io/oauth/token)

instructionSteps.title: Step 2: Configure the Wiz Data Connector
instructionSteps.description: Enter the Wiz API credentials and connection details below.
